topic: Restructure sk-design-interface into an sk-design parent of 4-7 focused design sub-skills, grounded in the external design-skills corpus

noveltyJustification: First pass; full corpus map, 7-cluster split, and two in-corpus router precedents (impeccable umbrella, designer-skills-main marketplace) all new

focus: designer-skills-main organizing model and boundary criteria
noveltyJustification: Marketplace loose-coupling evidence, skills-vs-commands sizing rule, build-vs-process split, and activity-not-aesthetic boundary criterion are new; raw collection list partially overlapped iter 1

ruledOut.approach: Atomic designer-skills as the unit for our children
ruledOut.reason: Wrong granularity (97 atoms vs 4-7 target); our children map to its commands/plugins

focus: Named aesthetics, apple-bento package anatomy, and the DESIGN.md artifact overlap
noveltyJustification: apple-bento package structure, the stitch-authors vs sk-design-md-generator-extracts DESIGN.md overlap, and the shared anti-slop taste core are new; named-aesthetic positioning partly confirmed prior hypotheses

ruledOut.approach: Four separate named-aesthetic children as peers
ruledOut.reason: Named aesthetics are a preset/axis layer, not activity children; four would exhaust the 4-7 budget on one domain

focus: Layout/structure and color/tokens child boundaries; impeccable shared-runtime coupling signal
noveltyJustification: Layout depth, oklch self-contained reference set, baseline cross-cutting nature, and the impeccable shared command-prefix/live.md coupling signal (F17) are new and decisive for KQ6

ruledOut.approach: Combining color and layout into one child
ruledOut.reason: Each has its own deep bundled reference set and distinct boundary; combining hides depth
They are modifiers (intensity dial + microcopy), fold into interface/taste or audit

focus: Motion/interaction cluster and the orthogonal domain-x-mode axis
noveltyJustification: The build-vs-audit document-format split and the orthogonal domain-x-mode axes (F20) are a new structural model that reframes the taxonomy and yields the hybrid recommendation

ruledOut.reason: It is an audit lens by format/intent, not a domain; homes in the audit/QA child
Buries deep domain knowledge like oklch color science and motion materials

focus: Audit/QA/hardening child boundary and the corpus HUB precedent (impeccable)
noveltyJustification: audit.md proving impeccable is a shared-context hub with in-hub routing (F23), plus the three structural-model exemplars framing KQ6 (F26), are new and decisive for the structural-model question

ruledOut.reason: They share one review/severity contract and belong in one audit/QA child

graphEvents.label: impeccable is an explicit shared-context hub with audit-as-router
designer-skills is a loose marketplace of independently-installable siblings

focus: impeccable hub anatomy as the parent template; pin bridge and selective loading
noveltyJustification: impeccable full hub anatomy, the pin hub-to-sibling bridge (F28), selective per-mode loading answering context cost (F29), and its dual child/parent role (F30) are new and central to the KQ6 recommendation

ruledOut.approach: A hub that co-loads all children at once
ruledOut.reason: impeccable proves selective per-mode reference loading is the norm
They are modes/packets grouped into ~6 categories, not skills

focus: Existing sk-design-* family, coupling asymmetry, compat constraints, local parent precedents
noveltyJustification: The already-existing self-identified sibling family (F31), interface-vs-md-generator runtime coupling asymmetry (F32), cross-repo name-reference compat constraint (F33), and the hub-vs-router local precedents (F34) are new and tip KQ6 toward a router-umbrella

ruledOut.approach: Folding sk-design-md-generator into a co-loaded hub
ruledOut.reason: Heavy Playwright backend + low coupling make it a lazily-loaded sibling, not a nested mode packet
Breaks cross-repo references and advisor/skill-graph metadata

focus: Coverage sweep and finalized corpus-source to candidate-child map (KQ5)
noveltyJustification: design-lab-as-explore-mode, redesign-as-cross-child-workflow, the static/presentation swing child (F38), and the complete cited source-to-child map (F40) are new; remainder confirmed prior clustering as coverage saturates

ruledOut.reason: Both are workflows/modes spanning existing children, not domains
Meta/infra and routing, not design-judgment domains

focus: Synthesized recommended taxonomy: 5 core children plus optional output (KQ4)
noveltyJustification: The uniform inclusion test, the recommended 5-child taxonomy with crisp boundaries, the 4/5/6/7 count variants, and the overlap-resolution seams are new synthesis not present in evidence-gathering iterations

ruledOut.reason: Exceeds 4-7 and includes out-of-scope process plugins
Audit is a distinct mode with a shared review contract and standalone invocation

focus: Parent structural model decision: umbrella-router with hub-inside-interface (KQ6)
noveltyJustification: The coupling/shared-runtime signal matrix, the tallied decision, the hybrid umbrella-across/hub-within recommendation, and the explicit refutation of the monolithic hub are new synthesis

ruledOut.approach: Monolithic single-hub for the whole family
ruledOut.reason: Runtime heterogeneity (Playwright backend vs judgment) + nesting breaks cross-repo name references

ruledOut.approach: Flat sibling set with no parent
ruledOut.reason: Loses the shared anti-slop base and the single discoverable door the corpus shows are valuable

focus: Per-child onboarding: triggers, advisor metadata, references, skill-graph (KQ8)
noveltyJustification: Per-child trigger/advisor/reference/skill-graph specs, parent routing defaults, and the advisor/skill-graph-rebuild onboarding gate are new and actionable for phases 002/004

focus: Backward-compatibility plan for folding in the two existing skills (KQ7 final)
noveltyJustification: Keep-flat-names compat win, alias-not-rename rule, augment-not-replace plan for interface, additive shared-base extraction, and the phase-mapped non-breaking migration are new and actionable

ruledOut.reason: Breaks cross-repo references; use an alias/redirect instead

ruledOut.approach: Embedding the shared base by copy into every child
ruledOut.reason: Causes drift and a mid-migration rules gap; reference it additively

focus: Adversarial stress-test: risks, tradeoffs, alternative taxonomies, where the recommendation could be wrong
noveltyJustification: Risk register with mitigations, the three-option tradeoff table, and the explicit falsification negatives (single-model bias, corpus-vs-usage, output child, design-lab statefulness) are the new adversarial-verification layer

ruledOut.approach: Presenting the 5-child taxonomy as the only option
ruledOut.reason: Grain is tunable (4/5/6/7); variants and tradeoffs must travel with the recommendation

focus: Final convergence: consolidated recommendation, answered-question ledger, open dials for phase 002
noveltyJustification: Consolidation iteration; intentionally low novelty (vote + ledger + convergence-trend + open dials), confirming diminishing returns at the cap
